mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate, directly boosting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 9.0 percent within a single month, it signals a tightening labor market that compresses recession risk expectations, triggering positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in more than 50 percent of instances where UNRATE drops below 9.0, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production growth combined with rising residential housing starts indicates synchronized real-economy expansion, which amplifies corporate earnings revisions and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict 60-day returns with Rank IC above 0.05, or the effect disappears when INDPRO and HOUST move in opposite directions.

mechanism_narrative: During a post-shock recovery regime, accelerating real GDP growth reduces the equity risk premium by confirming the sustainability of the economic rebound, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are flat or negative when GDPC1 growth accelerates in this regime, or the signal's predictive power is fully absorbed by FEDFUNDS movements.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index rises above 215.0, it signals entrenched inflation that forces the Federal Reserve to pause monetary accommodation, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in more than 60 percent of instances where CPIAUCSL crosses the threshold, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for PAYEMS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid payroll growth coupled with surging consumer credit balances indicates robust household spending power, which supports corporate revenue forecasts and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict 20-day returns with Rank IC above 0.04, or the effect reverses when PAYEMS growth outpaces RSAFS growth.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained industrial production expansion reflects improving capacity utilization and supply chain normalization, which directly supports earnings growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion phases are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When new housing starts exceed 550 thousand units, it signals a bottoming in the real estate sector and improved financial system balance sheets, triggering positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in more than 50 percent of instances where HOUST crosses the threshold, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for UNRATE changes.
